data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,200 USDT with a Narrowed 5.27% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 28, 2025, 15:16 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,200 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,202.52002 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 5.27% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: The US SEC’s cryptocurrency working group plans to hold roundtable meetings with industry participants, with the first meeting scheduled for March 21
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to an article published by Fox Business reporter Eleanor Terrett on the X platform, two people familiar with the matter said that the U.S. SEC cryptocurrency working group will hold a series of roundtable meetings with industry participants, with the theme of "Spring Sprint Towards Crypto Clarity". The first roundtable is scheduled for March 21 at the SEC office in Washington, D.C. The theme of the first meeting may be "Defining Security Status."

data.title: CoinDesk 20 Index Sees Decline Amid Market Fluctuations
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, the CoinDesk 20 Index experienced a notable decline, closing at 2612.03, which marks a 3.2% decrease, equivalent to a drop of 86.41 points, since 4 p.m. ET on Thursday. This index, which is a comprehensive measure of the cryptocurrency market, is traded across various platforms worldwide, reflecting the performance of leading digital assets.

Among the assets within the CoinDesk 20, only one showed an upward trend. Solana (SOL) emerged as a leader with a 1.4% increase, while Aptos (APT) saw a slight decline of 0.5%. On the other hand, Uniswap (UNI) and Aave (AAVE) were among the laggards, experiencing significant drops of 7.1% and 7.0%, respectively. These fluctuations highlight the volatile nature of the cryptocurrency market, where rapid changes in asset values are common.

The CoinDesk 20 Index serves as a broad-based indicator of the cryptocurrency market's health, encompassing a diverse range of digital assets. Its performance is closely monitored by investors and analysts alike, as it provides insights into market trends and potential investment opportunities. Despite the recent downturn, the index remains a crucial tool for understanding the dynamics of the global cryptocurrency landscape.

data.title: BlackRock deposited approximately 2,397 BTC worth $190 million to Coinbase 3 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Arkham monitoring, about three hours ago, BlackRock deposited Bitcoin to Coinbase Prime again. Its Bitcoin exchange-traded fund IBIT transferred a total of 2397.232 BTC to the Coinbase Prime Deposit address, with a value of approximately US$192.8 million.

data.title: Solana Proposal May Cut $SOL Inflation by 80%
data.description:
Solana’s community is considering a proposal that could potentially reduce inflation by 80%. The governance proposal, known as SIMD-0228, will usher in a new model that rewards users with greater participation levels.  Authored by Multicoin Capital partners Tushar Jain and Vishal Kankani, the proposal received significant support from Anza’s lead economist, Max Resnick. data.title: Anti-crypto SEC Commissioner: SEC Guidance on Meme Coins Does Not Provide Clear Legal Definition
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: In response to the guidance issued by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on Meme Coin, namely "Determining that Meme Coin is not a security", SEC Commissioner and crypto skeptic Caroline Crenshaw posted on the SEC's official website that the purpose of SEC staff providing written guidance is to promote understanding and compliance with federal securities laws, and the guidance issued by the SEC completely subverts this concept. It presents an incomplete and unfounded legal view that the entire product category is not under the jurisdiction of the SEC; this guidance does not provide a clear legal definition or even a basic dictionary. This guidance is not a reasonable interpretation of existing laws. It raises more questions than it answers, namely, what is Meme Coin and whether Meme Coin is a definable or useful classification in existing securities laws. It boils down to a broad statement of general principles that provides little clarity or predictability for any given currency.
